message:
Create P0 beads for Widget trait API migration (Buffer → Frame)

Comprehensive task breakdown for properly completing the Widget API migration:

- bd-2xi6: [EPIC] Widget Trait API Migration: Buffer → Frame
- bd-3coz: Audit all Widget implementations and categorize
- bd-2ryo: Update shared helper functions to use Frame
- bd-z8q6: Migrate simple buffer-only widgets (Category A)
- bd-1rqf: Migrate interactive widgets with hit testing (Category B)
- bd-10y0: Migrate input widgets with cursor control (Category C)
- bd-2pip: Add degradation support to complex widgets (Category D)
- bd-f38d: Migrate CachedWidget wrapper
- bd-2ua8: Migrate ErrorBoundary widget
- bd-1abx: Update widget tests for Frame-based API
- bd-2ixu: Final verification task
- bd-174b: Documentation of design decisions

The migration is directionally correct (Frame > Buffer for modern TUI
needs like hit testing, cursor control, degradation), but was poorly
executed with trait change without implementation updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
